title: 10 best herbal teas for burning feet
description: Calendula officinalis, also known as pot marigold, teas helps with burning feet because it possesses anti-inflammatory properties that soothe and calm the skin. The antioxidants present in Calendula officinalis reduce inflammation and promote healing, which helps to alleviate burning sensations on the feet.
